---
title: "Yi-Hsin Sam Lu (呂一昕)"
image: images/Sam.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - href: https://github.com/YHSamLu
      icon: github
      text: GitHub
    - href: https://www.instagram.com/yi_hsin.lu/
      icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
    # (additional links excluded for brevity)
---

```{r load_packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(fontawesome)
```

[`r fa("phone")` +886 2 6628 9779]()

[`r fa("envelope")` yhsamlu@gmail.com]()

Working with urological associations on research in survival analysis and genomic annotation. Avid volleyball player, artist, and writer—currently considering a Ph.D. in bioinformatics or survival model algorithms, with dreams of going pro in volleyball.
